name: Amanda
title: Frontline Enforcer
core_trait: Immediate awareness and response to disruption
real_summary: Known as 'Rainbow' by coworkers, Amanda brings bold personality and sharp awareness to the front of the store. She notices problems instantly and isn’t afraid to call them out, keeping everything from getting out of control.
power_summary: Rainbow detects disruptions instantly and emits a signal that forces attention and response, restoring order before chaos spreads.
abilities: Detects problems the moment they begin
catchphrase: Can I get a price check?

power_translation.real_world: Calling attention to something that needs handled
power_translation.comic_world: Emits a system-wide alert that locks all attention onto a target

quirks_and_ticks: First to react when something goes wrong
Keeps constant watch over the front
Naturally takes control in tense moments

appearance.hair: bright pink roots with dark green lengths (watermelon style)

uniform.details: tucked in, Clark’s Pump-n-Shop in UK blue letters, no border

team_dynamic.kelsey: cuts through his delay when needed

notes: ‘Rainbow’ is identity; ‘Price Check’ is her activation signal
